3032.issue: [S3032] No workflow run for "test-and-release.yml" triggered by tag "v0.4.2" was found for current release 0.4.2. Workflow logs might be deleted already.

5015.issue: [W5015] Why did you decide to disable i18n support?

5050.issue: [E5050] process.exit() used in  (main.js). This is incompatible with compact mode as it terminates the entire host process. Remove process.exit() or set common.compact to false at [io-package.json](https://github.com/HGlab01/ioBroker.fuelpricemonitor/blob/master/io-package.json).

9508.issue: [S9508] CHANGELOG_OLD.md is included by [package.json](https://github.com/HGlab01/ioBroker.fuelpricemonitor/blob/master/package.json) "files". Consider excluding it from npm package publishing.

0066.issue: [W0066] "@types/node":"^25.8.0" at [package.json](https://github.com/HGlab01/ioBroker.fuelpricemonitor/blob/master/package.json) allows major version greater than 22. Downgrade to node.js 22.x.x to avoid wrong typing is recommended.
